prestazioni: AE113 5.2L V12 twin-turbo (AE31) engine: Full Garrett GTX5533R turbocharger upgrade with billet compressor wheels, 106mm turbine wheels, and TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegates, paired with a custom 4-inch titanium downpipe system by Armytrix for unobstructed exhaust flow and 850+ WHP potential on E85 fuel.

Besoke Motec M150 ECU with full flex-fuel mapping, individual cylinder fuel trims, and anti-lag strategies for the AE31 V12, integrated with a Pectel SQ6M data logger for real-time telemetry and traction control adjustments via a Bosch MS4.0-based standalone system.

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression), custom valving for the DB11 AMR Pro’s aluminum-intensive chassis, and spherical bearing top mounts by AST Suspension, paired with a full polybush kit from SuperPro (part #SPF6005K) for subframe and control arm reinforcement.
estetica: RML Group-designed carbon fiber widebody kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear diffuser) with integrated cooling ducts for the AE31’s intercoolers, finished in a custom satin silver weave with exposed carbon edges, and secured via titanium fasteners from LZ Racing.

Vorsteiner V-FF107 21-inch forged wheels in a staggered 9.5x21 (front) and 12x21 (rear) configuration, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 R21 front, 325/25 R21 rear), with custom center-lock adapters by D2 Racing for quick-swap capability.

Full carbon fiber interior overhaul by Sabelt, including a custom roll cage with integrated fire suppression system (Sparco Pro 2000), Alcantara-wrapped Recaro SPG XL seats with 6-point harnesses, and a carbon fiber dash overlay with a Motec C127 digital dash display replacing the stock cluster.
